_comment: Survivorship policy for the contract entity type.
With a single source, survivorship is a direct pass-through — there are no
conflicts to resolve. The default_strategy first_non_null handles any
occasional null field within a record set.
output_fields defines the canonical contract schema exposed to BI/analytics.
Only these fields appear in the analytics-layer Parquet for this entity.
match_run_id) are always added by the publisher regardless of this list.
When a second contract source is integrated, add it to source_priority for
each attribute_rule and the engine will handle conflicts automatically at
Source IDs in source_priority must match entity extraction config source_id:

attribute_rules._comment: Primary key — always from mysql-rds, never null (raise_error in field mapping).
Contract name. mysql-rds is authoritative. Future CLM source would take higher priority.
Free-text description. Most recently modified source wins when multi-source.
Schema version of the contract record in source system.
Contract type classifier. mysql-rds is the system of record.
Reprocessing flag — take the most recently updated value.
Processing error message. Prefer longest (most informative) value when multi-source.
Originating author. mysql-rds is the system of record.
Creation timestamp — earliest across sources represents true creation time.
Last modification timestamp. Most recently updated source wins.
